titleStmt.title: SII 11.84: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 84. (B.K. No. 144 of 1926-27). HOMBAḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE TEMPLE OF ŚAṄKARALIṄGA.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I) and introduces his son Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bhuvanaikamalla Sōmēśvaradēva II as governing the Beḷvola Three Hundred and Purigeṟe Three Hundred divisions. The latter is described as the lord of VēMgīpura. The record registers a grant of land made by the Brahman Jakkimayya for the feeding of guests in the satra śālā, attached to the temple of Vishṇu, constructed by his ancestors and renovated by him, at the agrahāra village Poṁbuḻcha. It mentions Bayduṁbageṟe among the boundaries of the gift-land.
The record is dated Śaka 971, Virōdhi, Paushya, ba. 12, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti which regularly corresponds to Sunday, December 24, A.D. 1049.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīkāntādhīśvarō bhāti samastabhuvanēśvaraḥ yastasmai dānavānīkajiṣṇavē viṣṇavē namaḥ . © gaṇapatē namaḥ ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tadīyapṛyanandana nakhiḷajanamanōnandanaṁ . samadhigata
pañcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ . vēṁgīpuravarēśvaraṁ samarapracaṇḍaṁ kumaramārttaṇḍaṁ parakarimadani
vāraṇa . nammana gandhavāraṇaṁ . parivāranidhānaṁ . dānakānīnaṁ hayavatsarāja . rūpamanōjaṁ ripunṛpatihṛdaya
sallaṁ bhuvanaikamallaṁ . maṇḍaḷikaśikhāmaṇi bhūḷōkacūḍāmaṇi kaṭaka prākāraṁ . śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ . sōmēśvaradēva rbbeḷvola mūnūṟuṁ purigeṟe mūnūṟumaṁ bīḷānuvṛttiyināḷutaṁ sukhadinire . svasti ya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhisampannar . janaprasannar vēdavēdāṅgavēdāntapurā
ṇanyāyamimāṁsādyānēkāgama vidagdhavidvajjanasabhābharaṇar . ṇaru mappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ poṁbu
ḻcada mahājanaṁ nūḻirppadiṁbaruṁ yejanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadānapratigrahasvakarmma dharmmānu
ṣṭhānaparāyaṇarāgi sukhadinire tadaśēśabrahmasabhege nāgavarmmayyaṁ prā
rttisi dravyanivedanaṁgeydavaralli tanna sāmyada bhūmiyaṁ dhārāpūrbbakaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ paḍedu tannamunne
paḍisalisi māḍisida viṣṇugṛhada pratibaddhamāge śatrasāleyaṁ māḍisi . saka bhūpāḷakāḷākrānta saṁvatsaraṁ
ga 971 neya virōdhisaṁvatsarada pauṣya bahuḷa 12 Ādityavāradaṁdi nuttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti parvvadoḷ śatra
sarvvanamaśyavāgire paḍeda bhūmiyaṁ biṭṭaṁ tadīyavaṁśōditācāryyara guṇagaṇakramamēdōreṁtene . kanda . sakaThe letter ma is inserted above the line.
ḷabhuvanādhiguruvenipa kamaḷaśiva nuditamāda haricaraṇa mamaḷaṁ sāmaughānukārijanavi
hāradvijānvaya meseguṁ . vṛtta . migilappādvijavaṁśa cauḷukya jaroḷu negaḻda rddhōreyanā
mamappakuladoḷu kauṇḍinyagōtrapratha guṇaṁ jihvāgra taṁ brahmaṁ caturvvēdavidyegaḷoḷ bra
hmanenippa peṁpesavinaṁ śarvvōrvvarācakradoḷ . kanda . Ene negaḷdājisauryyana manu municaritātiśaya
na varavadhu vidvajjananute māṇikyāṁbike vinīte vikhyāte sītegeṇe guṇagaṇadoḷ . Ā puṇyamūrttigaḷgeda
yōpētaṁ sukṛtatatiparītaṁ madurāḷāpaṁ kaṁ . Uddhari
sirpparo ḷavana nijavṛddharmmāḍisida viṣṇugṛhamaḷidire jīrṇnōddhāraṁ māḍida nativṛddhi yāge jakkimayya
. palaṁ dānaṅgaḷoḷu sale migilappannadāna yi nī kali kālō śi
ṣṭajanaṁ kāyvudakṣaya dharmma
satyavākyaneṟe saṭṭaṁ .
khiḷajagatpāḷanōtkṛṣṭa
namukhyarkhyāta vēdiprākṛta ntama
ppārppenalvarṇnanameṁ syanallaṁ kētaka jakkanoḷpinde mikkaṁ . vacana . Intenisida viśuddhavaṁśā
diguṇagaṇānvitanappa jakkimayyana biṭṭa bhūmiya pramāṇa . Ūrakōla samakaṭṭinoḷūra mūḍa
bayduṁbageṟeya baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga mattar 15 huligoḷada baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka kappaḍigeṟeyiṁ mūḍa ma
rtta Interaḍuṁ taḷada mattarirppatta nālku Ā bhūmiya mahājanaṁ phalaṁmāḍisi yalli puṭṭeda
phaḷada pramāṇadiṁ takkanibar pravāsigargge nityasthiti yannadānamaṁ praciraṁ geyvar Arasugaḷa teṟe
yenenitaḷivu puṭṭidoḍaṁ śatrada keyyaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramāge pratipāḷisi dharmmamaṁ naḍe
yisuvar . Ivanāyannadineyde pāḷisidavaṁ giṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhi saṁbhavikuṁ koṇḍaḷidoṁge gaṁgegayekēdā
raṁ kurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḷ pēsadepārvvaraṁ goravaraṁ gōbṛndamaṁ peṇḍiraṁ tavekondikkida pāpameydugu
mavaṁ bīḷguṁ nigōdaṅgaḷoḷ . ślōka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sa
rvvānētānbhāvinaṟpārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacandraḥ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēta vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . © śrīmat jakkimayyana ma
rmmaṁ mahādēvayyana barepaṁ . sūṇḍiya sōvōjana kaṇḍaraṇe maṅgaḷaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
